prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 20 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 108.6 kg; Height 180.9 cm; BMI 33.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/69 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 8.7%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 210mg/dL; 9 months ago 210mg/dL; 6 months ago 185mg/dL; 3 months ago 185mg/dL; current 195mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 108.7kg; 9 months ago 107.7kg; 6 months ago 106.3kg; 3 months ago 108.1kg; current 108.6kg), Height (12 months ago 180.9cm; 9 months ago 180.9cm; 6 months ago 180.9cm; 3 months ago 180.9cm; current 180.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 73mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 69mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 68U/L; 9 months ago 66U/L; 6 months ago 69U/L; 3 months ago 77U/L; current 67U/L), AST (12 months ago 55U/L; 9 months ago 48U/L; 6 months ago 50U/L; 3 months ago 58U/L; current 50U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; current 53mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 184mg/g; 9 months ago 204mg/g; 6 months ago 165mg/g; 3 months ago 186mg/g; current 210mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 74mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 175mg/dL; 9 months ago 159mg/dL; 6 months ago 178mg/dL; 3 months ago 161mg/dL; current 167mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.61 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
